evals.prompt: Package the Sales_Dashboard from my dev org and save it to tableauNext/
evals.expected_output: Package JSON saved to tableauNext/Sales_Dashboard_package.json; agent runs package workflow with correct org and dashboard name

evals.prompt: Deploy the Executive_Overview_package.json to the QA org
evals.expected_output: Deployment to QA org; agent validates first (or uses dry-run), then deploys; reports workspace/dashboard on success

evals.prompt: How do I migrate dashboards from dev to prod?
evals.expected_output: Agent triggers skill; explains package-from-dev then deploy-to-prod workflow; suggests validation step; points to examples or scripts
